name: Do lawyers in New York have to disclose AI use in ranking dispute filings?

mainEntity.name: Do lawyers in New York have to disclose AI use in ranking dispute filings?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, many NY federal judges require AI disclosure in filings per standing orders.[3][9] Key factors: supervision duty.[3] Certify no AI or supervised, per local rules.[1] Noncompliance sanctions risk.[3]
